info: What is the primary purpose of Speech Therapy?
goals: Understand the core benefit of speech therapy in special needs education
answers: It helps improve speech clarity and verbal communication
It improves muscle coordination and motor control
It strengthens memory and cognitive skills
It has no proven therapeutic benefit

info: How many dots make up a standard Braille cell?
goals: Identify the structure of the Braille writing system
answers: Four dots arranged in a single row
Six dots arranged in two columns of three
Eight dots arranged in four columns
It has no proven therapeutic benefit

info: What is the main function of a screen reader?
goals: Understand the role of screen readers as assistive technology
answers: Converting on-screen text to speech or Braille output
Increasing the font size on a display
Translating content between languages
Adjusting screen brightness automatically

info: Which of the following is a widely used screen reader for Windows?
goals: Identify common screen reader software used by visually impaired users
answers: JAWS (Job Access With Speech)
Microsoft Word
Adobe Acrobat
Google Chrome extension

info: What challenge does sensory processing disorder commonly cause in individuals with autism?
goals: Understand sensory processing challenges associated with autism spectrum disorder
answers: Sensory overload and self-regulation difficulties
Difficulty processing abstract mathematical concepts only
Exclusively physical coordination problems
Adjusting screen brightness automatically

goals: Identify the role of AAC (Augmentative and Alternative Communication) devices
answers: A device that produces speech output from symbols or text
A hearing aid for noise amplification
A mobility scooter for physical disabilities
A type of magnifying glass

info: What does fine motor skills development primarily focus on?
goals: Differentiate between fine and gross motor skill development goals
answers: Strengthening and coordinating hand and finger movements
Improving balance and whole-body movement
Training long-term visual memory
It has no proven therapeutic benefit

info: What does IEP stand for in special education?
goals: Identify key terminology used in inclusive and special education planning
answers: Individualized Education Plan
International Education Protocol
Integrated Evaluation Procedure
It has no proven therapeutic benefit

info: How can creative arts support students with special needs?
goals: Understand the therapeutic value of creative expression for special needs learners
answers: Through creative art exercises and sensory play
By limiting social interaction to improve focus
Through structured competitive sports only
Adjusting screen brightness automatically
